name: association_serving_duckdb
description: Compact DuckDB serving artifact contract for published association and secondary-analysis payloads.

association_gene_payloads.semantics: Per-gene association payloads preserving published association entry semantics.

overall_gene_payloads.semantics: Per-gene overall payloads preserving published axis and ancestry summaries.

gene_catalog.semantics: Backend discovery table for available per-gene payload families.

build_metadata.semantics: Build-time metadata including export manifest identity and artifact provenance.

query_contract.association_by_gene: SELECT payload_json FROM association_gene_payloads WHERE dataset_type = ? AND gene_id = ?
query_contract.overall_by_gene: SELECT payload_json FROM overall_gene_payloads WHERE dataset_type = ? AND gene_id = ?

compatibility_notes: Serving payload JSON must preserve semantics from the published association artifacts.
Secondary-analysis tables may be updated independently without rebuilding association payload tables.
Redis-compatible caches are downstream consumers, not independent scientific transformation layers.
